home.title: Sebastian Weszler
home.subtitle: Software Engineer | Technology Enthusiast | Problem-Solver
home.description: I'm passionate about using technology to solve problems and improve people's lives. I'm always looking for new ways to innovate and create. If you have an idea, let's talk!

about.title: About Me
about.intro: Born and raised in Poland, I studied Electronic Engineering, which laid the foundation for my technical journey.
about.paragraph1: After graduation, I worked as a Technician before venturing into entrepreneurship, where I founded and operated a successful online bicycle store.
about.paragraph2: My passion for building and innovating eventually led me back to my technical roots. Today, I am a full-time Software Engineer, leveraging my diverse background to build robust, user-centric applications.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A selection of my open-source work and experiments. Most of my recent work is Python and JavaScript based.
projects.experienceLeadDesc: Leading technical architecture and implementation for various projects, focusing on performance, scalability, and user experience.
projects.experienceEntrepreneurDesc: Founded and operated a successful online bicycle store, managing everything from supply chain to customer experience and digital marketing.
projects.experienceTechDesc: Worked in technical roles following my Electronic Engineering studies, gaining hands-on experience with hardware and systems.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Thoughts on software engineering, technology, and building products.
blog.thanksForReading: Thanks for reading! If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to contact me.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have an idea or just want to chat? I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations.
contact.messageSentDesc: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.

resume.title: Resume
resume.description: Lead Full-stack Software Engineer with a passion for building high-quality software.
resume.experienceLeadDesc: Leading technical development and architecture for complex web applications. Mentoring junior developers and driving engineering best practices.
resume.experienceEntrepreneurDesc: Successfully founded and scaled an online bicycle retail business. Developed custom tools for inventory management and customer relationship management.
resume.experienceTechDesc: Maintenance and troubleshooting of electronic systems and hardware.
